subcodes.first_line: O Noble One! The Captive maketh mention of thee for the sake of God, the Lord of all worlds. He hath, verily, guided thee unto the Most Great Path and given thee to drink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میر یذکرک الاسیر لوجه الله رب العالمین انه هدیک الی الصراط الاعظم و سقاک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
